title: cupania oblongifolia
intro: Cupania oblongifolia, also known as the Yellow Cupania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cupania oblongifolia include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Cupania oblongifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
